## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Talal Syed for SEO Specialist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role focuses on high-level SEO strategy across multiple clients, acting as a "strike force" to optimize and refresh approaches](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Talal has 15+ years of diverse experience in SEO, content, and growth marketing across startups and agencies](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Position would start as 2-3 month contract, potentially leading to full-time; fully remote work is acceptable](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [GrowthX seeks someone to balance short-term goals with long-term strategy, adapting to changing client needs](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Context

  - [Andi leads customer operations/delivery side at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Need for high-level SEO strategist to:](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [Provide 30,000-foot view analysis](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [Shift strategies as needed](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [Conduct SEO analysis for QBRs and long-term planning](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [Act as a "strike force" across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Role would involve working across various client types (startups to enterprise)](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Focus on content, blog work, with growing emphasis on programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Experimenting with AI/ChatGPT applications in content](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

### Talal's Background and Experience

  - [15+ years in SEO, content, and growth marketing](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Key roles:](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [GSM Nation: Content and SEO (2 years)](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [ProPakistani: First employee, grew to 17M pageviews/month, 11x revenue growth](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [OnDeck: Led growth for founder programs (ODF, ODX)](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Stable: First marketing hire, doubled revenue, set up self-serve motion](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Recent focus: Content consulting/mini agency](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [Clients include Click (enterprise), HostFamily, FindHR](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Strong background in engineering, product marketing, and growth](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### SEO Strategy Communication

  - [Talal's approach:](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Connect SEO metrics to business goals and revenue impact](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Focus on key metrics important to client's OKRs](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Avoid overwhelming with tactical details unless requested](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Use Loom videos for quick explanations](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
      - [Create detailed Google Docs with screenshots and screencasts for processes](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

### Adapting to Client Needs

  - [Recent example: Shifted strategy for aggregator site client](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
      - [Original plan: 18 programmatic SEO pages/month](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
      - [New approach: Scaled to 100 pages/month by involving internal team](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
      - [Demonstrates flexibility and focus on delivering results](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

### Balancing Short-term vs. Long-term Strategy

  - [Talal's philosophy:](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [Identify and commit to minimum goals for survival](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [Allocate 10-20% capacity for long-term direction](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [Consider sustainability of tactics beyond immediate quarters](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [Balance immediate needs with future-proofing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andi to move Talal along in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Marilia or another team member to contact Talal about next steps](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Potential 2-3 month contract to start, with possibility of full-time role](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Further discussions on reporting structure (Andi vs. Jason) and specific project assignments](https://fathom.video/share/dyMWEQYt5XcouBaXxP4xXEDSyKTYSYMY?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
